---
format: revealjs
title: Mediendidaktik
subtitle: Lernorganisation
---

# Learning Management Systeme

## Anforderungen

@schulmeister_lernplattformen_2005

## Klassische Open-Source LMS

* Moodle
* Ilias

## LearningView

## MS-Teams

## MS-OneNote Classnotebooks

## Google Classrooms

## Lernpfad

https://lernpfad.ch/team

## KI-generated

## Franken-LMS

Monolyth vs Microservices
